spec_only_scope.evidence: Spec declares exploration/admission/spec-only mode and keeps production UI implementation, live server semantic changes, command adapter changes, and runtime changes out of scope.

canon_fit.evidence: Artifacts keep diagnostics export as support-artifact metadata while status and healthcheck remain separately labeled runtime packet owners.

layer_separation.evidence: Region matrix separates support metadata, runtime summary, history chart, latest records, and bounded actions.

json_validity.evidence: Both JSON artifacts validated with JSON tooling.

privacy_trace_scan.evidence: No external reference service traces, install prompts, private absolute paths, downloaded external evidence, or secret material found in scoped artifacts.

next_contour_bounds.evidence: Next implementation contour blocks live history, live latest records, raw log tail, support-bundle open/read, new backend commands, and runtime.py changes.

residual_risks: Supplemental diagnostics detail image is described as owner-provided content/layout supplement but is not repo evidence.
Live chart and latest-record regions remain deferred until a future bounded redacted JSON command surface exists.

adjudication.live_admitted_wording: Tightened after audit by replacing broad admission labels with static-boundary, metadata-only, and separately labeled runtime-summary classifications.
adjudication.supplemental_reference: Accepted as non-evidence visual supplement only; no external screenshots or private paths are recorded.

resume_from_here: Create closeout, run final scans, commit, and push.
